notableEvents.label: Jerar Encarnacion GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jerar Encarnacion grounds into a double play, third baseman Junior Caminero to second baseman Ben Williamson to first baseman Ryan Vilade. Jung Hoo Lee out at 2nd. Jerar Encarnacion out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Heliot Ramos GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Heliot Ramos grounds into a double play, pitcher Shane McClanahan to second baseman Ben Williamson to first baseman Ryan Vilade. Patrick Bailey out at 2nd. Heliot Ramos out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert grounds out, second baseman Ben Williamson to first baseman Ryan Vilade.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Junior Caminero batting, Chandler Simpson picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Willy Adames.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda grounds out, pitcher Robbie Ray to first baseman Rafael Devers.
